who: field service coordinators in the construction industry managing 5–15 equipment repairs/month
offer: For field service coordinators in the construction industry processing 5–15 equipment repairs/month, inefficient tracking causes delayed repairs. We provide real-time tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of equipment downtime leading to delayed repairs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for field service coordinators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to field service coordinators with demo video
Contribute to community forums for sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of downtime incidents and report generation for repairs on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
